ValidationRule.description: Prevents GRE users from editing the Lead Source (Source Type / Lead Source / Sub Source) on an existing lead. Creation is unaffected (NOT ISNEW), so GRE can still set the source when creating a walk-in lead.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Profile.Name = "GRE", NOT(ISNEW()), OR( ISCHANGED(Lead_source__c), ISCHANGED(Source_Type__c), ISCHANGED(Sub_Source__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You do not have access to edit the Lead Source. Please contact your administrator.
